name: Mini Florals 100g
description:
Mini Florals 100g

Product Description:

Assorted Whirls - a delicious mix of freckles, white, milk & caramel whirls - Made in Australia Please note that every computer monitor shows colours, contrasts and tones slightly differently so the colour appearing in the photo for this item is likely to be fairly close, but not an exact match, of the actual colour of this product.

Ingredients:

Sugar, Glucose Syrup (Wheat), Tapioca Starch, Food Acid (296), Stabiliser, Flavours, Maltodextrin, Colours (102, 110, 122, 123, 124, 133)
